measured: normal delivery remains isolated from the Meta control plane
first-class policy fixture coverage is enforced
production feedback and repeated-signal campaign admission are deterministic
Agent proposal authorship and bounded overlays are enforced
trusted result, authority, promotion and rollback invariants are enforced
soft: public fixture/scorer metadata declares intended behavioral coverage but does not itself prove live model quality
underpowered: live GPT/Claude/Cursor/Codex route, Gate, cost, lifecycle and project-delivery effects without real host adapter campaigns
